text: Alan, this species of veriformans' been extinct since the Cretaceous period.
I mean this thing is extinct. What?
It's... it's a dinosaur.
You did it.
You crazy son of a bitch.
You did it.
We could just tear up the role book on coldbloddeness.
It doesn't apply, it's totally wrong. This is a warm-blooded creature.
This thing doesn't live in a swamp.
This thing's got what, a 25, 27-foot neck?
Brachiosaur? Thirty.
We're gonna make a fortune with this place.
How fast are they?
Well, we clocked the T-rex at 32 miles an hour.
You said you've got a T-rex?
Say again? - We have a T-rex.
Put your head between your knees.
Dr. Grant, my dear Dr. Sattler...
Welcome... to Jurassic park.
They're moving in herds.
They do move in herds.
How'd you do this?
I'll show you.
